---
id: handle-merge-tags
title: "Merge tags"
description: "Merges multiple source tags into a destination tag. All links using source tags are updated to use the destination tag. Returns the number of affected links."
sidebar_label: "Merge tags"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/rushomon-url-shortener-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";

import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Merge tags"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/tags/merge"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Merges multiple source tags into a destination tag. All links using source tags are updated to use the destination tag. Returns the number of affected links.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>

>
